# LaventeCare website — AI context

> Current source of truth: Astro 7, React 19, Tailwind CSS 4 and a same-origin BFF for the LaventeCare Go backend.

## Architecture

- Astro server-rendered pages provide the public Dutch and English website.
- The same deployment serves `laventecare.nl` and `laventecare.com`; locale is domain-aware.
- React islands are used only for interactive flows such as contact, consent and authenticated tools.
- Browser requests to backend services go through `/api/*`; secure authentication cookies stay same-origin.
- Nanostores manages small cross-framework client state.
- Vercel hosts the production deployment.

## Commercial source of truth

- Website Start: €750 one-off; optional Website Care €29/month.
- Website Business: €1,000 one-off; optional Website Care €49/month.
- Custom Website: from €1,500 one-off; optional Website Care from €75/month.
- Prices exclude VAT. Mailboxes, licences, domains and out-of-scope additions are separate unless quoted.
- Do not silently increase these public website starting prices.

## Relevant files

- `src/components/blocks/WebsitePackages.astro`: package scope and prices.
- `src/components/blocks/PricingOverview.astro`: full pricing page.
- `src/pages/website-care.astro`: recurring website management terms.
- `src/components/blocks/TermsContent.astro`: public general terms.
- `src/pages/privacy.astro`: public privacy information.
- `src/lib/i18n/routes.ts`: paired Dutch and English routes.
- `src/pages/api/[...path].ts`: BFF boundary.

## Working conventions

1. Prefer `.astro` for server-rendered content and `.tsx` only when browser interactivity is needed.
2. Keep claims measurable and contextual; do not publish unverified absolute performance, uptime or conversion claims.
3. Keep Dutch and English routes, schemas, prices and legal links aligned.
4. Run formatting, linting, type checks, tests and the production build before delivery.
